rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations use int, real, or bool; avoid invalid scalar type references.
Align assumed types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
Avoid unsafe Boolean data range comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool.
Write type scope guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs, avoiding implementation-only paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Use logical operators and implication (=>) for contract expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not generate range assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or visible relations.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
